_doc: Probe questions for the RAGAS-style scorecard. These are NOT a gold set — there are no 'expected files'. RAGAS metrics are reference-free: a judge scores each answer for faithfulness/relevancy against the contexts the agent actually retrieved. The last entry is a negative control (the feature doesn't exist) to score honest abstention.

questions.q: How is authentication handled and where is the access token stored?
How are routes protected from unauthenticated users?
How does the app handle token refresh when the access token expires?
How does the app attach the auth token to outgoing HTTP requests?
How does the app communicate with the backend REST API?
Where is the director agent feature implemented?
